name: International Building Code 2024
copyright_notice: International Building Code® 2024 © 2024 International Code Council, Inc. Section numbers and numeric requirements are referenced as facts; no normative text is reproduced without paraphrase.

rules.label: Door Clear Width (2024 Update)
rules.citation: IBC 2024 §1010.1.1 – Egress doors shall provide a clear opening width of not less than 32 in. when set at 90°. The 36-in. minimum width applies for high-occupancy egress doors.
rules.remediation: Provide minimum 32-in. clear width on egress doors (36 in. for high-occupancy egress); confirm clear width is measured at 90° from door face to stop.

rules.label: Occupant Load – 2024 Factors
rules.citation: IBC 2024 §1004.5 / Table 1004.5 – Occupant load factors by space use; use net or gross floor area as specified for each row.
rules.remediation: Use 2024 Table 1004.5 load factors (renumbered from 2021 Table 1004.1.2).

rules.label: Sprinklers – 2024 Scoping by Occupancy
rules.notes_template: Verify NFPA 13 sprinkler requirements per occupancy in IBC 2024 §903.2 (Group A by area/load; Group B always for high-rise; all R; all I; H per category; etc.).
rules.citation: IBC 2024 §903.2.1–§903.2.11 – Automatic sprinkler systems are required by occupancy group with thresholds for area, occupant load, story, and height.
rules.remediation: Identify the project's occupancy group(s) and apply §903.2's specific subsections; design per NFPA 13.
